content.text: {"component":"accessing","summary":"Owner-facing report for Accessing presents a strong, enterprise-leaning access/security component narrative with RC-level contours, but current evidence in this repository is documentation and automation only; code-level verification remains pending.","strengths":["Clear, detailed owner-facing report with explicit scope and RC scorecard","Antora-based documentation site with structured component page","Automated site publishing and scheduled assessment workflows present","Probe snapshot path exists for Accessing, supporting regular refresh cadence"],"risks":["Evidence here is narrative-only; no Accessing source/tests in this repo","Potential drift between report claims and implementation reality","High maturity scores are asserted by docs without linked code artifacts","Automation relies on scheduled AI-backed assessment; variability possible"],"next_actions":["Link the Accessing report to its implementation repository and specific commit SHAs","Attach references to actual tests, security checks, and CI logs from the code repo","Add architecture diagram/ADRs or link them from the code repo","Provide runbook/ops artifacts (monitoring, alerts) or links to them","Include changelog/release cadence and version targeting sourced from code repo"],"notes":["This repository is the canonical Antora documentation site; Accessing implementation likely lives in a separate code repo","The Accessing page is present and detailed, but code/test artifacts are not in this repository"],"confidence":"medium","evidence_paths":[".antora-src/modules/ROOT/pages/component/accessing/report/index.adoc",".github/workflows/quality-atlas-assessment.yml",".github/workflows/gh-pages.yml","antora-playbook.yml",".sync/quality-atlas/components/accessing/probes/current.yaml"],"suggested_score_overrides":{"product":null,"architecture":null,"runtime":null,"qa":null,"ops":null,"market":null,"overall":null},"metric_updates":{"product":{"summary":"Component identity remains clearly articulated in the Accessing report (registration, verification, MFA, recovery, sessions), with RC-oriented positioning documented; verification against the implementation repo is still pending.","risks":["Current evidence is documentation-only in this repo; product claims are not cross-linked to code or releases"],"improvements":["Link the report to the Accessing implementation repository, releases, and user journeys"],"evidence":[".antora-src/modules/ROOT/pages/component/accessing/report/index.adoc"]},"architecture":{"summary":"Symfony-oriented, account-centric architecture is described in the report (verification, MFA, lock state, failure tracking), but this repository does not contain the source to validate it.","risks":["No code-level architectural artifacts (ADRs, module layout) in this repo to confirm design details"],"improvements":["Add or link ADRs/architecture diagrams and key module boundaries from the code repo"],"evidence":[".antora-src/modules/ROOT/pages/component/accessing/report/index.adoc"]},"runtime":{"summary":"Runtime surface (Symfony Security, CSRF, Mailer, Notifier, Rate Limiter) is claimed in the report; this docs repo does not provide runtime configs or executable artifacts for confirmation.","risks":["Lack of runtime configuration/manifests or sample env in this repo limits verification"],"improvements":["Link to runtime configuration examples and environment templates from the implementation repo"],"evidence":[".antora-src/modules/ROOT/pages/component/accessing/report/index.adoc"]},"qa":{"summary":"QA posture is described in the report as multi-band (lint/style/static analysis/tests), but this repository’s automation targets documentation and assessment only; no Accessing test artifacts are present here.","risks":["No unit/integration/E2E test configs or reports for Accessing in this repo"],"improvements":["Reference CI pipelines and test reports from the Accessing repo (coverage, static analysis, security scans)"],"evidence":[".github/workflows/quality-atlas-assessment.yml"]},"ops":{"summary":"Operational cadence is evidenced by automated docs publishing and scheduled assessments; security/ops posture for Accessing itself is documented but not code-verified in this repo.","risks":["No deployment/runbooks/monitoring artifacts for Accessing are present here"],"improvements":["Add or link runbooks, monitoring/alerting dashboards, and operational checklists from the code repo"],"evidence":[".github/workflows/gh-pages.yml",".github/workflows/quality-atlas-assessment.yml"]},"market":{"summary":"Market-facing alignment and ecosystem role are well-documented (internal access/identity capability), reading more as an internal governed component than a public product shell.","risks":["No external integration guides or public-facing collateral are linked from this page"],"improvements":["Add integration guidance and boundary/fit notes vs. other ecosystem components with links to examples"],"evidence":[".antora-src/modules/ROOT/pages/component/accessing/report/index.adoc"]},"overall":{"summary":"Overall RC direction is clearly presented in the Accessing report and prior snapshot; current repository evidence is documentation and automation, with implementation verification pending.","risks":["Maturity signals rely on narrative; lack of linked implementation evidence may mask gaps"],"improvements":["Cross-link the report to implementation evidence (code, CI, security, runtime) and maintain a simple evidence matrix"],"evidence":[".antora-src/modules/ROOT/pages/component/accessing/report/index.adoc",".sync/quality-atlas/components/accessing/probes/current.yaml"]}}}
